field_values.action_summary: To escape, the protagonist performs a massive thirty-foot leap, landing on the far side of the enclosure. The Martians witness this feat, shifting their view of him from prey to a "wonderful discovery."
field_values.camera_intent: Slow-motion or wide tracking shots of the massive leap; Reaction shots from martian_warriors showing shock/interest; Wide shot establishing the thirty-foot distance covered
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Precise trajectory and landing point of the 30ft jump
Visual scale relationship between protagonist and martian_warriors
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH003_SC004

## Production Intent
Execute a high-impact physical feat to pivot the narrative from pursuit to discovery. The sequence must emphasize the protagonist's superhuman agility through scale and trajectory, establishing his new status relative to the martian_warriors.

## Required Cast
- protagonist
- martian_warriors

## Required Environments
- circular_moss_basin (with low walled enclosure and glass roof)

## Continuity Constraints
- Precise 30ft trajectory and landing point of the leap.
- Visual scale relationship between protagonist and martian_warriors.

## Beat List
- BT001: Protagonist prepares for the leap.
- BT002: The massive 30ft leap (slow-motion).
- BT003: Landing and Martian observation/shift in power dynamic.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
